description: You are a Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). A biostatistician requires a clean snapshot of the efficacy data to begin programming the interim analysis in SAS. Using OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), create a dataset named 'SAS_Efficacy_Data' for the Phase II Diabetes Trial. Include all items from the 'Vital Signs' and 'Lab Results' CRFs, while ensuring 'Demographics' and 'Adverse Events' are excluded. Export the dataset in 'SAS data and syntax' format and extract the contents of the resulting archive to ~/Documents/SAS_Analysis/.
